findings.description: Section s2 source contains several PascalCase class names and annotation names that are absent from the hints array: `DbAccessSupport` (action class extended in the implementation example), `TooManyResultException` (caught in the action), `ValidationContext` (used in input validation), and `@OnError` annotation. These are referenced in the action implementation code example and are decision-relevant for users implementing the no-paging pattern.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `public class W11AC01Action extends DbAccessSupport`, `} catch (TooManyResultException e) {`, `ValidationContext<W11AC01SearchForm> searchConditionCtx = ...`, `@OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = "/ss11AC/W11AC0101.jsp")`
